arts.ttl: Amad sends demand to Man Utd team-mates after saving them against Southampton
arts.sum: Manchester United beat Southampton 3-1 at Old Trafford on Thursday evening thanks Amad’s 12-minute hat-trick and the Ivorian winger has left his team-mates in little doubt about his stance

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe looks furious after watching what £134m Man Utd duo did v Southampton
arts.sum: Manchester United might have enjoyed a stunning late comeback against Southampton but Sir Jim Ratcliffe had a face like thunder during the Premier League game. A Manuel Ugarte own-goal gave the Saints the lead going into 80 minutes but Amad Diallo turned the Old Trafford club’s fortunes around with a sublime hat-trick. arts.ttl: Man Utd eye SHOCK Nunez transfer, Arsenal hit with Sesko BLOW, Chelsea close in on deal: FT Recap
arts.sum: Man Utd eye SHOCK Nunez transfer, Arsenal hit with Sesko BLOW, Chelsea close in on deal: FT Recap Arsenal have agreed personal terms with Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi, though FootballTransfers understands there is still a slight sticking point that could yet block a deal for the Spain international.

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho tried to stay central and be the No 10 Ruben Amorim craves as Man United sources remain tight-lipped on Napoli interest, writes NATHAN SALT
arts.sum: NATHAN SALT: Ruben Amorim gesticulated wildly to Alejandro Garnacho early on in this game, telling him to get off the left wing and come back inside.

arts.ttl: Manchester United fans are all saying the same thing about Tyler Dibling after 3-1 win over Southampton
arts.sum: Manchester United left it late to secure a 3-1 win over Southampton in Thursday’s Premier League clash at Old Trafford. The Red Devils fell behind...

arts.ttl: Amad Diallo’s stunning 12-minute hat-trick rescues United and sinks sorry Saints
arts.sum: The hosts trailed to the Premier League’s bottom club until the Ivorian’s late show.

arts.ttl: Antony in 'astonishing' open goal miss as Ally McCoist tears into £80m Man Utd flop 'That's an absolute sitter'
arts.sum: The Brazilian flop has been a huge disappointment at Old Trafford and had fans shocked after a horror miss

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes warns Ruben Amorim about what Erik ten Hag was 'always' doing at Man United
arts.sum: Manchester United transfer news as Ruben Amorim receives the backing of a club legend after a decent start to his reign at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Awful’ – BBC reporter reacts to what he saw from 6/10 Man Utd star in first-half v Southampton
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho’s miss against Southampton has been blasted by BBC journalist Simon Stone. The Manchester United winger had the perfect opportunity to put his side 1-0 up but he flashed the ball wide. arts.ttl: Premier League issue statement as Man Utd denied penalty during Southampton clash
arts.sum: Manchester United were denied a penalty when Southampton defender Kyle Walker-Peters handled the ball in his own area against the Red Devils under pressure from Amad Diallo
